title: Whitefurze Dry Food Container - White Lid 3L
features: This handy 3L food storage tub is ideal for storing may different dried foods such as cereal, pasta, nuts, rice, oats and much more.

Featuring an easy open pouring lid makes it a great dispenser for cereals and other day to day pourable food items. The tightly fitting lid ensures that the food content is preserved well giving a longer life. With its preserving feature, the tub could also we used to store pet food.
Measuring 20cm x 10cm x 24cm, the slim design makes it easy enough to store away when not it use and lightweight and portable to take on a picnic or camping trip.
Food safety approved. Base dishwasher safe # Lid should be washed by hand. Base microwave safe without lid for reheating purposes. Base and lid are refrigerator and freezer safe.
